title: 有馬記念の後に・至宝

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Satono Diamond wins the Arima Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She vows to challenge every peak moving forward
and contribute to the development of the
Japanese Umamusume world.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In addition, she promises Kitasan Black that
they'll always be by each other's sides.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Though they walk different paths, they'll both
keep running together as they continue forward.
